'''âp-f-sh''' ('''kapafash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:camisole|camisole]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:camisole|camisole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-f-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kapafash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipafash|thipafash]] || [[word:jipafash|jipafash]] || [[word:shipafash|shipafash]] || [[word:kipafash|kipafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupafash|thuthupafash]] || [[word:jujupafash|jujupafash]] || [[word:shushupafash|shushupafash]] || [[word:kukupafash|kukupafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupafash|thupafash]] || [[word:jupafash|jupafash]] || [[word:shupafash|shupafash]] || [[word:kupafash|kupafash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupafash|thupafash]] || [[word:jupafash|jupafash]] || [[word:shupafash|shupafash]] || [[word:kupafash|kupafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepafash|thepafash]] || [[word:jepafash|jepafash]] || [[word:shepafash|shepafash]] || [[word:kepafash|kepafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopafash|thothopafash]] || [[word:jojopafash|jojopafash]] || [[word:shoshopafash|shoshopafash]] || [[word:kokopafash|kokopafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopafash|thopafash]] || [[word:jopafash|jopafash]] || [[word:shopafash|shopafash]] || [[word:kopafash|kopafash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopafash|thopafash]] || [[word:jopafash|jopafash]] || [[word:shopafash|shopafash]] || [[word:kopafash|kopafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpafash|thĂŠpafash]] || [[word:jĂŠpafash|jĂŠpafash]] || [[word:shĂŠpafash|shĂŠpafash]] || [[word:kĂŠpafash|kĂŠpafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapafash|thathapafash]] || [[word:jajapafash|jajapafash]] || [[word:shashapafash|shashapafash]] || [[word:kakapafash|kakapafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapafash|thapafash]] || [[word:japafash|japafash]] || [[word:shapafash|shapafash]] || [[word:kapafash|kapafash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapafash|thapafash]] || [[word:japafash|japafash]] || [[word:shapafash|shapafash]] || [[word:kapafash|kapafash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapafash|shapafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapafash|goshapafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapafash|gokishapafash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapafashnĂŒ|shapafashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapafashnknĂŒ|goshapafashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapafashnĂŒ|gokishapafashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapafashĂ«|shapafashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapafashnkshĂ«|goshapafashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapafashĂ«|gokishapafashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapafashro|shapafashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapafashnkro|goshapafashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapafashro|gokishapafashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapafashmu|shapafashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapafashnkmu|goshapafashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapafashmu|gokishapafashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapafasher|shapafasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapafashnksher|goshapafashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapafasher|gokishapafasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapafashng|shapafashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapafashnkng|goshapafashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapafashng|gokishapafashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapafashya|shapafashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapafashnkya|goshapafashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapafashya|gokishapafashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapafashyam|shapafashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapafashnkyam|goshapafashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapafashyam|gokishapafashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapafashnĂŒshĂ«|shapafashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapafashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapafashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapafashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapafashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapafashnĂŒro|shapafashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapafashnknĂŒro|goshapafashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapafashnĂŒro|gokishapafashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapafashnĂŒmu|shapafashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapafashnknĂŒmu|goshapafashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapafashnĂŒmu|gokishapafashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapafashĂ«nĂŒ|shapafashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapafashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapafashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapafashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapafashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapafashĂ«ro|shapafashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapafashnkshĂ«ro|goshapafashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapafashĂ«ro|gokishapafashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapafashĂ«mu|shapafashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapafashnkshĂ«mu|goshapafashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapafashĂ«mu|gokishapafashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapafashronĂŒ|shapafashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapafashnkronĂŒ|goshapafashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapafashronĂŒ|gokishapafashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapafashroshĂ«|shapafashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapafashnkroshĂ«|goshapafashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapafashroshĂ«|gokishapafashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapafashromu|shapafashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapafashnkromu|goshapafashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapafashromu|gokishapafashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapafashmunĂŒ|shapafashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapafashnkmunĂŒ|goshapafashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapafashmunĂŒ|gokishapafashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapafashmushĂ«|shapafashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapafashnkmushĂ«|goshapafashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapafashmushĂ«|gokishapafashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapafashmuro|shapafashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapafashnkmuro|goshapafashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapafashmuro|gokishapafashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
